case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. AKEEM BRYANT ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, AKEEM DOES I TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-10-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-10-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-18-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 57247856) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR NANCY LEE HERSH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-26-2015 THROUGH JAN-24-2016.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-10-2015 CONTINUED TO SEP-09-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-05-2015. THE SEP-09-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100004093) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT BRYANT, AKEEM
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR HERSH, NANCY LEE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57444919), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAY-14-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, AKEEM
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME (TRANSACTION ID # 57444919) FILED BY ATTORNEY BENSON, SUSAN M
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100004093) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRYANT, AKEEM JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR MICHAEL FRANCIS HARDIMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-05-2015 THROUGH JAN-03-2016.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15166098) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRYANT, AKEEM
PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY IS DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
